title: WeBuild – Ownership Attestation (Ownership) – SD-JWT VC payload
description: Schema for the SD-JWT VC payload of an Ownership attestation as defined in the Ownership Rulebook (Chapter 3.2). This models the JSON claims set prior to SD-JWT disclosure/packing. The Ownership records all natural and legal persons holding direct or indirect ownership in a legal entity, providing comprehensive transparency on beneficial ownership structures and economic interests in support of KYC/KYS processes and AML obligations.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type. Base type is 'eu.we-build.ownership.1'.

iss.description: Identifier of the entity that issued the attestation (URI or DID). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

iat.description: Issuance date and time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

exp.description: Expiry date and time as a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch). SHALL NOT be selectively disclosable. Per RFC 7519.

attestation_legal_category.description: The legal category of the attestation as defined by eIDAS 2. For Ownership attestations this SHALL be 'EAA', as the attestation is typically self-issued by the legal entity subject to the ownership disclosure.

issuing_entity.description: The identifier of the legal entity that issued the attestation. For Ownership attestations this is typically the subject entity itself (self-issued EAA).

owner.description: Array of owner objects (either natural person or legal person). SHALL contain at least one natural person owner to comply with AML requirements that mandate identification of natural persons who ultimately own the entity.

items.description: A single owner entry. The 'type' field identifies whether the owner is a natural person (NP) or a legal entity (LE). Each owner entry includes identity attributes, address, and at least one ownership record.

type.description: Indicates whether the owner is a natural person (NP) or a legal entity (LE). SHALL be non-empty.

natural_person.description: Details of a natural person owner. Required when type is 'NP'.

first_name.description: First name(s), including middle name(s) where applicable, of the natural person who holds ownership or control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

surname.description: Last name(s) or surname(s) of the natural person who holds ownership or control. SHALL be a non-empty string.

date_of_birth.description: Day, month, and year of birth of the natural person. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

legal_person.description: Details of a legal person (entity) owner. Required when type is 'LE'.

legal_name.description: The complete official name of the legal entity which holds ownership interests in the subject entity. SHALL be a non-empty string.

legal_form.description: The legal form of the owning legal entity (e.g., GmbH, AG, Ltd, SA, BV). SHALL be a non-empty string.

identifier.description: The identification of the legal entity which owns this entity. At least one identifier (euid, lei, or tax) must be specified.

euid.description: European Unique Identifier (EUID) per ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Optional.

lei.description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) per ISO 17442. Optional.

tax.description: Tax Number or national company registration number. Optional.

address.description: Address of the owner. For natural persons this is the residence address; for legal persons this is the registered address. All sub-fields are mandatory per the Rulebook data model.

street.description: Street name of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

house_number.description: House or building number of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

locality.description: City or locality of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

region.description: State, province, or region of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

postal_code.description: Postal or ZIP code of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the address. SHALL be non-empty.

ownership.description: Array of ownership records for this owner. At least one ownership record SHALL be present per owner entry.

items.description: A single ownership record describing the ownership interest held by this owner.

legal_identifier.description: The identifier of the owned entity (e.g., EUID, LEI, or national registration number). SHALL be non-empty.

type.description: Type of ownership interest. SHALL use one of the standardized values: 'direct' or 'indirect', as defined in Section 2.8.2 of the Ownership Rulebook.

stake.description: The percentage of ownership held (0–100) as a decimal, or a rule string where the exact percentage is not determinable. SHALL be non-empty.

oneOf.description: Percentage of ownership as a decimal value between 0.00 and 100.00 (inclusive).
Rule string describing the ownership stake where exact percentage is not determinable.

amount.description: Nominal monetary value of the ownership interest, or null where nominal value is not applicable or not available.

oneOf.description: Nominal value and currency of the ownership stake.

value.description: Nominal value of the ownership stake, or null if not applicable.

oneOf.description: Null where nominal value is not applicable.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the nominal value, or null if not applicable.

oneOf.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code (e.g., EUR, USD).
Null where currency is not applicable.
Null where amount is not applicable.

category.description: Category of shares or interest held. SHALL use one of the standardized values defined in Section 2.8.1 of the Ownership Rulebook.

economic_rights.description: Economic rights associated with the ownership interest. SHALL contain at least one value from Section 2.8.3 of the Ownership Rulebook.

evidence.description: List of supporting documentation substantiating the ownership structure calculation (e.g., shareholder register, organizational chart, trust deed). At least one piece of evidence SHALL be present. Evidence MAY be provided as a URI reference or as an embedded base64-encoded document.

items.description: A single piece of supporting evidence for the ownership structure.

evidence_id.description: URI reference to the evidence document (e.g., organizational chart, shareholder register). The organization chart is made available through a dedicated link. If the Relying Party (RP) requires additional information regarding the organizational structure, it may download the relevant document and use it as supporting evidence for the ownership list calculation. SHALL be a non-empty string.

evidence_type.description: Defines the type of the object, which SHALL be 'Evidence'.

evidence_data.description: The actual organizational structure document as a base64-encoded string. This field is required if the 'evidence_id' does not contain a URI to an existing location where the organization structure content is available. Optional.

evidence_confirmation.description: Boolean confirmation that the organizational structure document is current and has been used as the basis for the ownership calculation. Optional.

evidence_date.description: The date when the evidence document was created or last updated. SHALL follow ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD). Optional.

status.description: Status object per SD-JWT VC status-list mechanism. MUST be present when the technical validity period is greater than 24 hours.

type.description: Status mechanism type. For SD-JWT VC Status List this SHALL be 'status-list'.

status_list_credential.description: URI of the Status List Credential that contains the bitstring indicating revocation status.

status_list_index.description: Zero-based index into the status list bitstring for this credential.

status_purpose.description: Purpose of the status entry. For Ownership attestation this SHALL be 'revocation'.

trust_anchor_url.description: URL at which a machine-readable version of the trust anchor used for verifying the Ownership attestation can be found or looked up. Optional.

schema_version.description: Version of the Ownership attestation schema used. Optional.

cnf.description: Confirmation claims per SD-JWT VC. Holder binding via JWK is recommended.

jwk.description: Public key bound to the holder.
